name: YieldMo
description: Mobile-first SSP offering viewable brand-safe ad formats with integration to DSPs and header bidding for apps.

seo.title: YieldMo — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: YieldMo: Mobile-first SSP offering viewable brand-safe ad formats with integration to DSPs and header bidding for apps.

when_to_use: Viewable mobile-first ad format monetization for publishers
Brand-safe SSP inventory for mobile web and in-app display
Header bidding integration for programmatic yield optimization

pros: Good integration with DSPs and header bidding
cons: Smaller than tier-1 SSPs like Magnite
review.verdict: Nice mobile-first brand SSP with premium formats, narrower fit for global performance monetization.
review.best_for: US mobile publishers prioritizing brand-safe viewable formats and premium CPMs.
review.not_for: Global performance pubs or apps needing rewarded, offerwall, or pure CPI demand.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
